query: Synthesize a research report on AI safety from the PDF documents in my library using NotebookLM.
Ask my NotebookLM about the main goals of 'Project Beta' from the notebook ID 123.
Generate a quiz for my study session about quantum computing from the uploaded documentation.
List all the notebooks I have currently stored in my NotebookLM account.
Create a mind-map visualization for the project architecture documentation using my research library.
Can you research the latest trends in renewable energy by aggregating sources from my notebook?
Upload these three papers to NotebookLM and start a research session on their findings.
Generate an audio overview for my latest research notes in my NotebookLM project.
I need to study the physics textbook I uploaded; create some flashcards and a study guide.
Sync and list the contents and sources of my existing NotebookLM projects.
Create a new notebook titled 'Deep Learning Research' and start adding PDF sources.
Ask NotebookLM: What are the key takeaways from the meeting transcript I just added?
Search for 'NotebookLM pricing' on Google using web search.
Convert this PDF file named 'Manual.pdf' to a markdown document.
Read the first 50 lines of the local file research_notes.txt in my workspace.
List all my git repositories in this project folder.
Summarize the content of the AUTHENTICATION.md file I have open right now.
Add a comment to the ClickUp task about the research progress for the next sprint.
Download a file from 'https://example.com/data.zip' and save it locally.
What is the current weather in London right now?
Visualize the dependency graph of my python project's modules.
I want to chat about the future of AI. What do you think about agentic workflows?
